segments.text: Lal's got really tight parries, you know?
segments.original_text: あれだなラルくんってとてもジャスガうまいじゃないですか

segments.text: But Link's bair is putting in serious work
segments.original_text: だけどリンクの空中後ろがいい味出してるわ

segments.text: He's converting that parry into the next hit
segments.original_text: ジャスガに対して次のタッチになってる

segments.text: And the delay tech here is clean too
segments.original_text: こういうディレイもうまいし

segments.text: A player who's fought through everything with pure fundamentals
segments.original_text: やはり体一つで叩かれてきた男
あー撃墜しちゃったー

full_text: Lal's got really tight parries, you know? But Link's bair is putting in serious work He's converting that parry into the next hit And the delay tech here is clean too Yeah A player who's fought through everything with pure fundamentals There's the KO! And then after that
